FileRootSettings.CommonShellSettings:
<CommonShellSettings xmlns="http://schemas.aspentech.com/xaml/presentation/visualisation/commonshell" xmlns:atapi="clr-namespace:AspenTech.AspenPlus.Infrastructure;assembly=AspenTech.AspenPlus.Infrastructure" xmlns:assembly="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" xmlns:atapmaa="clr-namespace:AspenTech.AspenPlus.Modules.ApwnApplication;assembly=ApwnShell" xmlns:atapie="clr-namespace:AspenTech.AspenPlus.Infrastructure.Events;assembly=AspenTech.AspenPlus.Infrastructure" xmlns:s="clr-namespace:System;assembly=mscorlib" xmlns:apmab="clr-namespace:AspenPlus.Modules.ApwnBrowser;assembly=ApwnShell" xmlns:cxv="http://schemas.aspentech.com/xaml/presentation/cxsviewmodel" xmlns:aeaui="clr-namespace:Aspentech.EnergyAnalysis.UserInterface;assembly=Aspentech.EnergyAnalysis.UserInterface" xmlns:aeauiip="clr-namespace:Aspentech_EnergyAnalysis_UserInterface_ItemPages;assembly=Aspentech.EnergyAnalysis.UserInterface"><CommonShellSettings.CurrentWorkspace><ShellWorkspace ActivationBarState="<DashboardPanel IsExpanded="false" IsTurnedOff="false" Version="39">
 <Item Type="AspenTech.ActivationDashboard.EconomicAnalysis.DashboardItem">&lt;!--This is the current state of Economics Analysis Dashboard--&gt;
&lt;Root&gt;
 &lt;OnOffState Value="Off" /&gt;
 &lt;CapitalCost Value="" Units="USD" /&gt;
 &lt;UtilityCost Value="" Units="USD/Year" /&gt;
 &lt;HasError&gt;false&lt;/HasError&gt;
 &lt;_statusCode Value="-1" /&gt;
 &lt;Flags&gt;
 &lt;_isRunCompleted Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_isRunning Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_incompleteButActivated Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_incompleteButLoaded Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_incompleteButSized Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_incompleteButMapped Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_completeEvaluatedNotAutoRun Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_isSimulationChanged Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_isInStopping Value="false" /&gt;
 &lt;_isOnOffButtonCanBeUsed Value="true" /&gt;
 &lt;_isResetDashboardButLeaveItOn Value="true" /&gt;
 &lt;/Flags&gt;
&lt;/Root&gt;</Item>
 <Item Type="AspenTech.ActivationDashboard.EnergyAnalysis.DashboardItem">&lt;!--This is the current state of Energy Analysis Dashboard--&gt;
&lt;Root&gt;
 &lt;IsExpanded&gt;false&lt;/IsExpanded&gt;
 &lt;OnOff&gt;Off&lt;/OnOff&gt;
 &lt;Status&gt;None&lt;/Status&gt;
 &lt;PUS&gt;&lt;/PUS&gt;
 &lt;Percent&gt;&lt;/Percent&gt;
 &lt;Units&gt;MW&lt;/Units&gt;
&lt;/Root&gt;</Item>
 <Item Type="AspenTech.ActivationDashboard.EdrActivation.DashboardItem">&lt;EDR&gt;
 &lt;IsShowModelStatus&gt;false&lt;/IsShowModelStatus&gt;
 &lt;IsShowRiskStatus&gt;false&lt;/IsShowRiskStatus&gt;
 &lt;IsShowLegend&gt;false&lt;/IsShowLegend&gt;
 &lt;DetailCount&gt;0&lt;/DetailCount&gt;
&lt;/EDR&gt;</Item>
</DashboardPanel>" Layout="<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xamDockManager version="19.2.20192.90">

Specifications" ResultsOnly="False" PathKey="Top.appModelV8.Components.Specifications"><atapie:ShowFormEventArgs.Parameters><s:String assembly:Key="id">Specifications</s:String><s:String assembly:Key="main">Top.appModelV8.Components.Specifications</s:String></atapie:ShowFormEventArgs.Parameters></atapie:ShowFormEventArgs></atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenSubject.ShowFormArgs><atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenSubject.PlotwizardRule><apmab:ApwnPlotwizardRule ContextPath="Top.appModelV8.Components.Specifications" /></atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenSubject.PlotwizardRule></atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenSubject></WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenSubject><WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenState><atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenState><atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenState.Parameters><cxv:CxvParameter Name="main" Value="Top.appModelV8.Components.Specifications" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="id" Value="Specifications" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="extraComments_path" Value="Comments" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="extraDescription_path" Value="Input.DESCRIPTION" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="extraUnits_path" Value="Input.Unit Set" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="NotNeedName" Value="NotNull" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="NotNeedType" Value="NotNull" /><cxv:CxvParameter Name="selected_tab" Value="tab0" /></atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenState.Parameters></atapmaa:ApwnFormScreenState></WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenState></WorkspaceScreenData></ShellWorkspace.Screens></ShellWorkspace><ShellWorkspace Name="Energy Analysis" Layout="<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>

</xamDockManager>" NavigationGroupToSelect="Energy Analysis" IsNavigationPaneMinimized="False" IsRibbonMinimized="False"><ShellWorkspace.Screens><WorkspaceScreenData PaneName="_AnonymousScreen1" ScreenFactoryKey="UIPageScreen"><WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenSubject><aeaui:UIScreenSubject Key="Project 1.Saving Potentials" Header="Project 1 - Saving Potentials" NavigationGroupKey="Energy Analysis" /></WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenSubject><WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenState><aeaui:UIScreenState><aeaui:UIScreenState.ContentState><aeauiip:SavingPotentialPageState ScreenZoomFactor="1" HotSideFluidFilterIndex="3" ColdSideFluidFilterIndex="3" IsUtilitiesViewExpanded="True" IsHeatExchangerDetailsViewExpanded="True"><aeauiip:SavingPotentialPageState.VisibleHeatExchangerDetailsColumns><s:Int32>0</s:Int32><s:Int32>1</s:Int32><s:Int32>2</s:Int32><s:Int32>3</s:Int32><s:Int32>4</s:Int32><s:Int32>5</s:Int32><s:Int32>6</s:Int32><s:Int32>7</s:Int32><s:Int32>8</s:Int32><s:Int32>9</s:Int32><s:Int32>10</s:Int32><s:Int32>11</s:Int32><s:Int32>12</s:Int32><s:Int32>13</s:Int32><s:Int32>14</s:Int32><s:Int32>15</s:Int32></aeauiip:SavingPotentialPageState.VisibleHeatExchangerDetailsColumns><aeauiip:SavingPotentialPageState.ColumnDisplayIndexes><s:Int32>0</s:Int32><s:Int32>1</s:Int32><s:Int32>2</s:Int32><s:Int32>3</s:Int32><s:Int32>4</s:Int32><s:Int32>5</s:Int32><s:Int32>6</s:Int32><s:Int32>7</s:Int32><s:Int32>8</s:Int32><s:Int32>9</s:Int32><s:Int32>10</s:Int32><s:Int32>11</s:Int32><s:Int32>12</s:Int32><s:Int32>13</s:Int32><s:Int32>14</s:Int32><s:Int32>15</s:Int32></aeauiip:SavingPotentialPageState.ColumnDisplayIndexes></aeauiip:SavingPotentialPageState></aeaui:UIScreenState.ContentState></aeaui:UIScreenState></WorkspaceScreenData.ScreenState></WorkspaceScreenData></ShellWorkspace.Screens></ShellWorkspace></CommonShellSettings.NavigatorGroupWorkspaces></CommonShellSettings>
